name: Miscellaneous Product Sales
query:
SELECT `tabSales Invoice Item`.`item_code` AS 'Item:Link/Item:200',
sum(`tabSales Invoice Item`.`qty`) AS `จำนวนขาย`, 
sum(`tabSales Invoice Item`.`amount`) AS `ยอดขาย`
FROM `tabSales Invoice Item`
WHERE ((lower(`tabSales Invoice Item`.`item_code`) like '%%สินค้า ราคา%%')
   AND date(`tabSales Invoice Item`.`creation`) BETWEEN date(date_add(now(), INTERVAL -30 day)) AND date(now()))
GROUP BY `tabSales Invoice Item`.`item_code`
ORDER BY sum(`tabSales Invoice Item`.`qty`) desc
